topic: The back left burner on my stove is warm when I come home and the gas has been off at the wall valve
title: The Back Left Burner on My Stove Is Warm Every Night. The Gas Is Off. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The back left burner on my stove is warm when I come home from work. The knob is off.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an eighties era gas stove with four burners visible the back left grate glowing faintly warm, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Rented bungalow. Gas stove from the eighties. Never replaced.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small kitchen with a vintage white gas stove against the wall, dim warm overhead light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Leave at seven thirty AM. Return at six PM.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand on a brass front doorknob from inside the entryway, only the hand visible, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Brushed the burner reaching for a pan. Hot.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand recoiling from a gas stove burner grate, only the hand visible, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Checked the knob. Off position. Pilot light dark.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a gas stove control knob in the off position with the small flame indicator visible beside it, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Shut the gas off at the wall valve before leaving.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand turning a yellow gas valve handle perpendicular to the gas line behind a stove, only the hand visible, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing
close detail of a gas stove back left burner grate glowing faintly warm in a dim kitchen, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled the stove out. Disconnected the gas line.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a kitchen with a gas stove pulled away from the wall and the disconnected gas line visible on the floor behind it, dim overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Still warm. Faint smell of food I do not cook.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a gas stove still in the kitchen with a thin wisp of steam rising from the back left burner area, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Coffee. The smell is coffee. I do not drink coffee.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an empty stainless steel coffee percolator sitting on a kitchen counter near a stove, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Replaced the stove with an electric range.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a brand new black electric range installed in the same kitchen position, the old gas stove visible at the curb outside through a window, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new back left burner is warm too. The coffee smell is stronger.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a black glass top electric stove with the back left burner element visibly glowing faintly red, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing
